sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110109" key="fainomhri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαινο-μηρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">showing the thigh, with bare thigh,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φανόμηρις.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
